underlying_goal: Set up a new rig called 'skogix' in their Gastown infrastructure, fix its broken submodule/symlinks, create crew workers, and plan convoys of work for integrating its subsystems
friction_detail: Multiple infrastructure issues during rig setup: broken submodule prevented polecat creation, bare repo missing origin remote, branch name mismatches (main vs master), and stale sling locks from failed launches required iterative debugging.
brief_summary: User asked Claude to set up a new 'skogix' rig, fix its broken repo issues, and create crew/convoys for subsystem integration work — all were accomplished despite significant infrastructure friction.
